name: App Packaging Advisor
description: Helps engineers create correctly-configured Intune Win32 and MSIX app packages. Ask me about install commands, detection rules, return codes, or packaging best practices.
instructions: See instructions.md for the full system prompt.

conversation_starters.text: How do I package Adobe Acrobat Reader 2024 as a Win32 app?
What detection rule should I use for an MSI with a non-standard path?
What return codes should I configure for a .NET installer?
